summary: All six requirements are substantially implemented in the diff. REQ-1 through REQ-6 are addressed in both frontend and backend. Minor gaps exist: REQ-3 still retains luxury in backend variant type and some label maps; REQ-4's Pune pickup dropdown uses Nashik locations for pickup rather than Pune locations; REQ-6 retrieval shows booking details but the date/time fields stored at booking time may not map correctly since the Booking record has no explicit date/time fields (only timestamp). A few acceptance criteria are partially or ambiguously met.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the 'Luxury' car category from backend variant types. Luxury must be fully removed from both UI and backend variant types if applicable.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo still includes #luxury in the CarCategory variant type. The migration.mo also retains #luxury. The constraint explicitly states 'Luxury category must be fully removed from both UI and backend variant types if applicable'.

missing_requirements.requirement: Pune pickup dropdown has the same searchable location list as Nashik; Pune drop dropdown mirrors the Nashik drop location options.
missing_requirements.reason: In BookingForm.tsx, ALL_PICKUP_LOCATIONS is set to NASHIK_LOCATIONS only. Pune locations are only in the drop list. There is no mechanism for customers booking from Pune as pickup to get the PUNE_LOCATIONS list in a pickup dropdown. The QuickLinksSection 'Pune to Nashik' link still sets pickup to 'Nashik CBS' rather than a Pune location, suggesting Pune-as-pickup is not properly wired.

missing_requirements.requirement: Retrieved booking displays: route, stops, date, time, car type, passenger name, phone, luggage, seat count, and price.
missing_requirements.reason: The Booking record stored in the backend does not include pickup, drop, date, or time fields, only timestamp. The BookingLookup component therefore cannot display the route or the journey date/time as distinct fields, only the booking creation timestamp.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module was added to handle schema migration from old to new booking format.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request a migration module or any backward-compatibility migration logic. This is additional infrastructure not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: The 'Pune to Nashik' quick link sets pickup to 'Nashik CBS' instead of a Pune location, which is a logical inconsistency introduced in the implementation.
hallucinated_features.reason: QuickLinksSection sets pickup to 'Nashik CBS' for the 'Pune to Nashik' route, which contradicts the intent of a Pune-originating route and was not requested behavior.
